title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
bookSummary: A desert planet, a noble family in danger, and a young heir pulled into politics, prophecy, and survival.
movieSummary: Denis Villeneuve's adaptation follows Paul Atreides as House Atreides takes stewardship of Arrakis.

title: The Martian
author: Andy Weir
bookSummary: An astronaut stranded on Mars turns engineering, humor, and stubborn optimism into a survival plan.
movieSummary: Ridley Scott's film turns the rescue mission into a bright, witty space survival adventure.
quotes: Hope grows one fix at a time.

title: Jurassic Park
author: Michael Crichton
bookSummary: A theme park full of cloned dinosaurs becomes a warning about ambition, control, and systems failing at scale.
movieSummary: Steven Spielberg's blockbuster adaptation blends wonder, suspense, and sharp warnings about spectacle.

title: Ready Player One
author: Ernest Cline
bookSummary: A treasure hunt inside a virtual universe becomes a race through pop culture, identity, and corporate control.
movieSummary: The film adaptation turns the digital quest into a fast, effects-driven adventure.

title: The Hunger Games
author: Suzanne Collins
bookSummary: A televised survival contest becomes the spark for resistance, image-making, and moral courage.
movieSummary: The adaptation follows Katniss Everdeen from tribute to reluctant symbol.

title: Ender's Game
author: Orson Scott Card
bookSummary: A gifted child is trained through games that blur strategy, manipulation, and empathy.
movieSummary: The film adaptation focuses on Battle School, command, and the burden of winning.
quotes: Children should not inherit every war.

title: The Time Machine
author: H. G. Wells
bookSummary: A traveler pushes into the far future and finds beauty, danger, and uncomfortable questions about progress.
movieSummary: The film reimagines the journey through time with sweeping future-world visuals.

title: The War of the Worlds
author: H. G. Wells
bookSummary: An invasion story turns human certainty upside down as ordinary life meets overwhelming alien force.
movieSummary: The modern film adaptation grounds the panic through one family's survival.
quotes: Small lives matter in large disasters.

title: I Am Legend
author: Richard Matheson
bookSummary: A lone survivor navigates isolation, memory, and the frightening line between monster and myth.
movieSummary: The film adaptation recasts the story as a haunting post-apocalyptic survival drama.
quotes: Legends depend on who is left.

title: Annihilation
author: Jeff VanderMeer
bookSummary: An expedition enters a transformed zone where biology, memory, and identity become unstable.
movieSummary: Alex Garland's film turns the strange area into a hypnotic ecological nightmare.
quotes: Change can be beautiful and terrifying.

title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
bookSummary: A comfort-loving hobbit is pulled into a quest with dwarves, a wizard, a dragon, and a much larger world than he expected.
movieSummary: The film adaptation begins Bilbo's road toward the Lonely Mountain.
quotes: Home means more after the road.

title: The Fellowship of the Ring
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
bookSummary: A dangerous ring draws a fellowship across a world of ancient power, loyalty, and sacrifice.
movie: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
movieSummary: Peter Jackson's adaptation opens the journey from the Shire toward Mordor.
quotes: Even small hands can help history turn.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
author: J.K. Rowling
bookSummary: An orphan discovers a hidden school of magic, friendship, rivalry, and a mystery tied to his past.
movie: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
movieSummary: The film introduces Hogwarts, first friendships, and the wonder of the wizarding world.
quotes: A letter can change a life.

title: The Princess Bride
author: William Goldman
bookSummary: A playful adventure of true love, swordplay, revenge, giants, and wonderfully theatrical danger.
movieSummary: A beloved fairy-tale comedy that turns quests, villains, and romance into endlessly quotable fun.

title: Stardust
author: Neil Gaiman
bookSummary: A young man crosses into a magical realm and finds that a fallen star is not what he imagined.
movieSummary: The film adaptation turns the fairy-tale quest into a warm, witty romantic fantasy.

title: The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe
author: C. S. Lewis
bookSummary: Four children enter a winter-bound world where courage, loyalty, and wonder awaken a kingdom.
movieSummary: The film brings Narnia's snowy magic and battle for freedom to the screen.
quotes: A wardrobe can become a doorway.
Kings and queens begin as children.

title: Howl's Moving Castle
author: Diana Wynne Jones
bookSummary: A young woman cursed into old age finds magic, self-possession, and a very unusual moving home.
movieSummary: Studio Ghibli's adaptation emphasizes wonder, anti-war feeling, and emotional transformation.
quotes: A home can walk with you.
Curses cannot name the whole heart.

title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland
author: Lewis Carroll
bookSummary: A curious child tumbles into a world of riddles, reversals, and dreamlike logic.
movieSummary: The film reimagines Wonderland as a lavish return to a strange kingdom.

title: The Wonderful Wizard of Oz
author: L. Frank Baum
bookSummary: A girl swept from Kansas follows a strange road toward courage, heart, wisdom, and home.
movieSummary: The classic film adaptation turns the journey into one of cinema's most recognizable fantasies.
quotes: Home can be the bravest destination.

title: The Neverending Story
author: Michael Ende
bookSummary: A lonely reader discovers that imagination, grief, and courage can shape an endangered world.
movieSummary: The film adaptation celebrates reading as a portal into heroic fantasy.

title: Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
bookSummary: Elizabeth Bennet and Mr. Darcy spar through pride, class, family pressure, and slowly earned affection.
movieSummary: A sweeping adaptation centered on glances, misunderstandings, and emotional restraint breaking open.
quotes: A laugh can reveal the truth.

title: The Notebook
author: Nicholas Sparks
bookSummary: A summer romance becomes a lifelong story of memory, class difference, and devotion.
movieSummary: The film adaptation leans into rain-soaked longing and enduring love.

title: Me Before You
author: Jojo Moyes
bookSummary: A caregiver and a wealthy quadriplegic man form a bond that challenges comfort, choice, and love.
movieSummary: The film adaptation focuses on charm, tenderness, and difficult decisions.

title: The Fault in Our Stars
author: John Green
bookSummary: Two teens living with cancer find wit, fear, and first love inside a fragile stretch of time.
movieSummary: The film adaptation follows their connection with humor and heartbreak.
quotes: Love is not measured by time.

title: Jane Eyre
author: Charlotte Bronte
bookSummary: An independent governess seeks dignity, love, and moral clarity in a house full of secrets.
movieSummary: The film adaptation emphasizes atmosphere, restraint, and fierce self-respect.
quotes: A quiet will can be iron.
Love must leave room for selfhood.

title: Sense and Sensibility
author: Jane Austen
bookSummary: Two sisters navigate grief, money, manners, and different styles of loving wisely.
movieSummary: The film adaptation balances wit, feeling, and social pressure with warmth.

title: Emma
author: Jane Austen
bookSummary: A clever matchmaker learns humility as her confident social plans tangle other people's hearts.
movieSummary: The film adaptation gives the comedy of manners a bright, stylized visual language.

title: Atonement
author: Ian McEwan
bookSummary: A child's accusation reshapes lives across class, war, guilt, and impossible longing.
movieSummary: The film adaptation turns memory and regret into a lush romantic tragedy.
quotes: Love waits inside what might have been.

title: The Time Traveler's Wife
author: Audrey Niffenegger
bookSummary: A relationship bends around involuntary time travel, absence, and devotion across years.
movieSummary: The film adaptation focuses on romance strained by impossible timing.

title: Crazy Rich Asians
author: Kevin Kwan
bookSummary: A professor meets her boyfriend's ultra-wealthy family and faces expectation, spectacle, and self-worth.
movieSummary: The film adaptation celebrates romance, family pressure, and lavish social comedy.

title: Gone Girl
author: Gillian Flynn
bookSummary: A marriage becomes a media spectacle after a disappearance reveals layers of manipulation and resentment.
movieSummary: David Fincher's cool, tense adaptation turns the missing-person story into a sharp psychological trap.

title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
author: Stieg Larsson
bookSummary: A journalist and hacker investigate a decades-old disappearance inside a powerful family.
movie: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
movieSummary: The film adaptation turns the mystery into icy investigative suspense.

title: The Da Vinci Code
author: Dan Brown
bookSummary: A symbolist and cryptologist follow clues through art, history, and conspiracy.
movieSummary: The film adaptation turns puzzle-solving into a globe-trotting mystery chase.
quotes: A clue can open a cathedral.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
author: Thomas Harris
bookSummary: An FBI trainee consults a brilliant imprisoned killer while hunting another predator.
movieSummary: The film adaptation became a tense psychological thriller built on interviews and dread.
quotes: The mind is the darkest room.

title: The Bourne Identity
author: Robert Ludlum
bookSummary: An amnesiac man discovers dangerous skills and a conspiracy trying to erase him.
movieSummary: The film adaptation reshaped the spy thriller with kinetic realism.

title: Shutter Island
author: Dennis Lehane
bookSummary: A marshal investigates a psychiatric facility where weather, trauma, and truth twist together.
movieSummary: The film adaptation turns the island mystery into a psychological maze.
quotes: Truth can be a locked ward.

title: The Firm
author: John Grisham
bookSummary: A young lawyer joins a prestigious firm and discovers the perks hide dangerous obligations.
movieSummary: The film adaptation turns legal ambition into a paranoid escape plan.

title: Misery
author: Stephen King
bookSummary: An injured author is held by a fan whose devotion turns terrifyingly possessive.
movieSummary: The film adaptation concentrates the dread into a claustrophobic battle of wills.

title: The Talented Mr. Ripley
author: Patricia Highsmith
bookSummary: A charming impostor pursues wealth, identity, and belonging through deception.
movieSummary: The film adaptation bathes the suspense in sunlit elegance and unease.

title: No Country for Old Men
author: Cormac McCarthy
bookSummary: A man finds drug money and triggers a bleak pursuit shaped by chance, violence, and fate.
movieSummary: The film adaptation delivers stark suspense across the Texas borderlands.

title: Charlotte's Web
author: E. B. White
bookSummary: A gentle story about friendship, courage, farm life, and the words that can save someone.
movieSummary: A warm family adaptation that keeps the farmyard friendship at the heart of the story.

title: Matilda
author: Roald Dahl
bookSummary: A brilliant child uses books, courage, and a little magic against cruel adults.
movieSummary: The film adaptation turns Matilda's clever rebellion into a funny, heartfelt family classic.

title: Where the Wild Things Are
author: Maurice Sendak
bookSummary: A child sails into a wild emotional world and learns about anger, imagination, and home.
movieSummary: The film adaptation expands the picture book into a moody adventure about feelings.

title: The Polar Express
author: Chris Van Allsburg
bookSummary: A nighttime train ride carries a child toward belief, wonder, and Christmas magic.
movieSummary: The film adaptation transforms the journey into a snowy motion-capture spectacle.

title: The Lorax
author: Dr. Seuss
bookSummary: A bright cautionary tale about trees, greed, and speaking up for what cannot speak.
movieSummary: The film adaptation expands the environmental fable into a colorful musical comedy.

title: Paddington
author: Michael Bond
bookSummary: A polite bear from Peru finds a new home, comic trouble, and a family in London.
movieSummary: The film adaptation turns the beloved bear into a warm modern family adventure.

title: How to Train Your Dragon
author: Cressida Cowell
bookSummary: A young Viking challenges tradition by befriending the dragon he was expected to fight.
movieSummary: The animated film adaptation turns the premise into a soaring friendship adventure.
quotes: The sky belongs to the brave.

title: The Tale of Peter Rabbit
author: Beatrix Potter
bookSummary: A mischievous rabbit finds trouble in a garden while learning about boundaries and bravery.
movieSummary: The film adaptation updates the garden rivalry with slapstick family comedy.

title: The BFG
author: Roald Dahl
bookSummary: A girl and a gentle giant collect dreams and stand against much scarier giants.
movieSummary: The film adaptation gives the dream-country adventure a glowing fantasy scale.

title: Holes
author: Louis Sachar
bookSummary: A boy sent to a desert camp uncovers buried history, friendship, and family curses.
movieSummary: The film adaptation keeps the mystery, humor, and sunbaked adventure tightly connected.

title: Little Women
author: Louisa May Alcott
bookSummary: Four sisters grow through art, ambition, love, loss, and the daily work of becoming themselves.
movieSummary: Greta Gerwig's adaptation braids memory and adulthood into a lively portrait of the March sisters.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
bookSummary: A child's view of justice, prejudice, and courage unfolds in a small Southern town.
movieSummary: The film adaptation centers moral courage through Atticus Finch and Scout's perspective.

title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
bookSummary: A mysterious millionaire's dream collides with wealth, longing, and the illusions of reinvention.
movieSummary: The film adaptation turns Jazz Age excess and yearning into a glittering tragedy.

title: Moby-Dick
author: Herman Melville
bookSummary: A whaling voyage becomes an obsession-driven confrontation with nature, fate, and command.
movieSummary: The film adaptation brings Ahab's pursuit and the sea's scale to classic adventure cinema.

title: Great Expectations
author: Charles Dickens
bookSummary: An orphan's rise through class, shame, love, and mystery questions what truly makes a gentleman.
movieSummary: The modern film adaptation reimagines Dickens through art-world ambition and longing.

title: A Christmas Carol
author: Charles Dickens
bookSummary: A miser's haunted night becomes a moral reckoning about generosity, memory, and change.
movieSummary: The animated film adaptation turns the ghostly visits into a dark holiday spectacle.

title: The Secret Garden
author: Frances Hodgson Burnett
bookSummary: A lonely child discovers a locked garden and helps a household heal through care and growth.
movieSummary: The film adaptation emphasizes atmosphere, friendship, and emotional restoration.

title: The Call of the Wild
author: Jack London
bookSummary: A domesticated dog is pulled into the Yukon and awakens to instinct, hardship, and freedom.
movieSummary: The film adaptation follows Buck through wilderness adventure and companionship.

title: Dracula
author: Bram Stoker
bookSummary: Letters, diaries, and dread build a gothic hunt against an ancient vampire.
movieSummary: The film adaptation leans into lavish gothic romance and horror.

title: Frankenstein
author: Mary Shelley
bookSummary: A scientist's creation forces questions about ambition, responsibility, loneliness, and humanity.
movieSummary: The film adaptation stages the gothic tragedy with heightened emotion and spectacle.
